metaTitle: Living with Knee or Joint Pain? Solutions That Help | Avana Surgical
metaDescription: Doctor-recommended bracing, offloaders, and recovery support for everyday knee and joint pain — fitted in India, dispatched by Osteokart.

hero.eyebrow: I Have Knee or Joint Pain
hero.title: Less pain. More of the life you love.
hero.description: If walking, climbing stairs, or just standing for too long has become a daily struggle, you are not alone — and there is more you can do than just rest. Explore the bracing and recovery solutions trusted by Indian orthopaedic surgeons.
hero.imageAlt: Person walking comfortably with knee support

conditionsHeading.title: What kind of joint pain are you dealing with?
conditionsHeading.lead: Joint pain isn't one thing. The right support depends on the cause — and we can help you figure it out.

conditions.title: Daily knee ache
conditions.description: Wear-and-tear pain, often worse on stairs or after long walks. Offloader bracing meaningfully reduces pain in many patients.

conditions.title: Knee gives way
conditions.description: Instability from ligament weakness or past injury — a stabiliser brace can restore confidence.

conditions.title: Stiff joints in the morning
conditions.description: A classic sign of osteoarthritis. Combination of bracing, physiotherapy, and weight management works best.

conditions.title: Pain after activity
conditions.description: Pain that flares with exercise or work often responds to functional bracing that controls excess motion.

productsHeading.title: Solutions for everyday joint pain
productsHeading.lead: These products are chosen for people managing chronic or recurring joint pain — clinically supported, sold and dispatched by our retail partner Osteokart.

testimonials.name: Radhamani
testimonials.testimonial: Initially there was discomfort due to lack of instructions, but the customer service team helped me wear it properly. Now it gives me confidence while walking and good support for my knees.

testimonials.name: Bhuvaneswari T
testimonials.testimonial: Very supportive, now feeling much better. We were so satisfied that we purchased one for the other knee as well.

seoContent.title: When daily joint pain becomes the new normal — what actually helps
seoContent.intro: Most adults learn to live with joint pain rather than treat it. That's a missed opportunity. Modern bracing, paired with the right movement, can change the experience of pain.

sections.heading: Is it 'just age' or something more?
sections.body: Age-related joint wear (osteoarthritis) is common, but the pain it causes is not inevitable. The right brace can offload the painful part of the joint and meaningfully reduce day-to-day discomfort.

sections.heading: Why bracing helps
sections.body: A well-fitted brace does three things: it offloads the painful part of the joint, controls motion that worsens pain, and reminds the surrounding muscles to do their job — together this can keep you active longer.

sections.heading: When to see a specialist
sections.body: If pain lasts more than two weeks, your joint locks or gives way, or you cannot fully bend or straighten — book an orthopaedic consultation. Bracing complements treatment; it doesn't replace diagnosis.

seoContent.disclaimer: This page is educational and not a substitute for medical advice.

faq.question: Will I need surgery eventually?
faq.answer: Not necessarily. Many patients with osteoarthritis manage their condition for years with bracing, physiotherapy, weight management, and lifestyle changes. Surgery is one option — not the inevitable one.

faq.question: How long until I notice a difference from bracing?
faq.answer: Most patients notice reduced pain within days of correct fitting, with meaningful functional improvement over 4-8 weeks of consistent use.

faq.question: Can I wear a brace under regular clothes?
faq.answer: Yes — modern braces are designed to be low-profile and worn comfortably under loose trousers or skirts during daily activity.

cta.title: Not sure which solution is right for your pain?
cta.description: Tell us about your condition — our clinical team will guide you to the right support, with no pressure to purchase.
